name: fixthis
description: Agent workflows for local, debug-only Jetpack Compose UI feedback handoff through FixThis.

skills.name: fixthis-install-agent
skills.description: Install and verify FixThis in a debug Jetpack Compose Android app.

skills.name: fixthis-feedback-loop
skills.description: Read, claim, implement, verify, and resolve FixThis feedback items.

skills.name: fixthis-android-evidence
skills.description: Attach scoped Android runtime evidence to a FixThis feedback item.

skills.name: fixthis-release-smoke
skills.description: Run FixThis release and trust-loop smoke checks.
